scripts.start: cd apps/api && npx prisma migrate deploy && node dist/server.js
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=packages/shared && npm run build --workspace=apps/api
scripts.build:all: npm run build --workspace=packages/shared && npm run build --workspace=apps/api && npm run build --workspace=apps/web
scripts.test:all: npm run test --workspace=apps/api && npm run test:e2e --workspace=apps/web
